expectations.text: Settings grouped in rounded containers with large radius
Each setting has an icon from lucide-react in a colored rounded box
expectations.evidence: Lines 143-144: 'w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-surface-container-low flex items-center justify-center' with icon inside each SettingRow

expectations.text: Section titles use uppercase tracking-widest labels
expectations.evidence: Line 211: 'text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.25em] text-primary' for page label; Line 424: 'text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.25em]' for footer

expectations.text: Cards use border border-white subtle edge
expectations.evidence: Line 109: 'border border-white shadow-sm' on SettingsSection cards
Lines 27-49: Reusable Toggle component with 'w-12 h-7 rounded-full' and spring-animated knob
Lines 97-100: 'initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 24, scale: 0.97 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }}' on each section

eval_feedback.overall: With-skill output is a faithful Sanctuary settings page implementation.
